Regulatory

Document Agency Date Keywords
Considerations for the Design and Conduct of Externally Controlled Trials for Drug and Biological Products (Online) (path) FDA 2023/02 External Control
E9(R1) STATISTICAL PRINCIPLES FOR CLINICAL TRIALS: ADDENDUM: ESTIMANDS AND SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS IN CLINICAL TRIALS (Online) (path) FDA 2021/05 Estimand
Multiple Endpoints in Clinical Trials Guidance for Industry (Online) (path) FDA 2022/10 Multiple Endpoints
Optimizing the Dosage of Human Prescription Drugs and Biological Products for the Treatment of Oncologic Diseases (Online) (path) FDA 2024/08 Dose Optimization
Real-World Evidence: Considerations Regarding Non-Interventional Studies for Drug and Biological Products (Online) (path) FDA 2024/03 Real-World Evidence (RWE)
ICH E9 (R1) addendum on estimands and sensitivity analysis in clinical trials to the guideline on statistical principles for clinical trials (Online) (path) EMA 2020/02 Estimand, Sensitivity Analysis
Master Protocols for Drug and Biological Product Development (Online) (path) FDA 2023/12 Protocol
Digital Health Technologies for Remote Data Acquisition in Clinical Investigations (Online) (path) FDA 2023/12 Digital Health
Data Standards for Drug and Biological Product Submissions Containing Real-World Data (Online) (path) FDA 2023/12 Real-World Data (RWD)
Real-World Data: Assessing Registries to Support Regulatory Decision-Making for Drug and Biological Products (Online) (path) FDA 2023/12 Real-World Data (RWD)
Rare Diseases: Considerations for the Development of Drugs and Biological Products (Online) (path) FDA 2023/12 Rare Diseases
Approaches to Assessment of Overall Survival in Oncology Clinical Trials Guidance for Industry (Online) (path) FDA 2025/08 Overall Survival (OS)
Clinical Trial Endpoints for the Approval of Cancer Drugs and Biologics Guidance for Industry (Online) (path) FDA 2018/12 Clinical Trial Endpoints
Use of Data Monitoring Committees in Clinical Trials (Online) (path) FDA 2024/02

Data Monitoring Committees (DMC)
Establishment and Operation of Clinical Trial Data Monitoring Committees (Online) (path) FDA 2006/03 Data Monitoring Committees (DMC)
Adaptive Design Clinical Trials for Drugs and Biologics Guidance for Industry (Online) (path)
 		FDA 2019/12 Adaptive Design
Development of Cancer Drugs for Use in Novel Combination - Determining the Contribution of the Individual Drugs’ Effects (Online) (path) FDA 2025/07 Dose Combination
Hematologic Malignancies: Regulatory Considerations for Use of Minimal Residual Disease in Development of Drug and Biological Products for Treatment (Online) (path) FDA 2020/01 Minimal Residual Disease (MRD)
Myelodysplastic Syndromes: Developing Drug and Biological Products for Treatment (Online) (path) FDA 2025/07 Myelodysplastic Syndromes (MDS)
Minimal Residual Disease and Complete Response in Multiple Myeloma: Use as Endpoints to Support Accelerated Approval (Online) (path) FDA 2026/01 Minimal Residual Disease (MRD), Multiple Myeloma (MM)
